---
title: "test_math.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\test_math.py"
loc: 40
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.75
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.14
---

## Intent
The `test_math.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on tokenize, vectorize, similarity. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via tokenize, vectorize, similarity. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [math](file://math)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `tokenize`
- `vectorize`
- `similarity`
